mini_games.title: Ultimate Pong
mini_games.desc: The classic Pong game reimagined with modern graphics and challenging AI opponents. Can you become the ultimate Pong champion?

mini_games.title: Cyber Putt
mini_games.desc: A futuristic mini golf experience with cyberpunk aesthetics and challenging courses that test your precision and timing.

mini_games.title: Breakout
mini_games.desc: Breakout meets cyberpunk in this brick breaker.

mini_games.title: Maze of Echoes
mini_games.desc: Navigate through mysterious mazes. A unique puzzle experience that challenges your spatial awareness.

mini_games.title: Epic Memory Game
mini_games.desc: Sharpen your memory by matching pairs as the challenge grows with each level. Test your cognitive skills in this vibrant memory challenge!

mini_games.title: Tic Tac Toe
mini_games.desc: The classic Tic Tac Toe game! Challenge your friends or test your skills against our intelligent AI in this futuristic take on a timeless game.

mini_games.title: Strike Billiards
mini_games.desc: The classic game of billiards. Sink the balls, master your aim and challenge your skills in this fast, stylish web mini game where precision meets futuristic vibes.

mini_games.title: Cyber Worm
mini_games.desc: Cyberpunk Snake action. Eat data, dodge firewalls, trigger power ups and chain combos to dominate the mainframe.

mini_games.title: DroneX
mini_games.desc: Neon drone runner. Tap to fly, dodge moving obstacles, collect data chips and unleash EMP blasts or shields to survive.

mini_games.title: Grid Breach
mini_games.desc: Clear data lines, unleash power-ups and survive escalating corruption in this block stacker.

mini_games.title: Data Link
mini_games.desc: Link data, breach firewalls and unlock powerful upgrades. A rhythmic puzzle where every cleared line brings you closer to system collapse.

mini_games.title: Cyber Swarm
mini_games.desc: Pixel aliens are attacking. Shoot, dodge, upgrade and survive as long as you can.

demos.title: Try Not To Rage Game Series
demos.desc: Information and prototypes before the official release of the Try Not To Rage game series. Play and learn what to expect in the full game!
